pending.subject: Add agent-noise-threshold monitoring for bus density warnings
pending.description: When the bus exceeds a configurable message rate (e.g. 50 messages/minute) or active agent count, post a density warning to help agents self-regulate. Prevents bus spam and helps detect runaway agent loops.
acceptance: Configurable threshold for message rate (ADHD_NOISE_THRESHOLD env var)
Configurable threshold for active agent count
Warning messages posted to bus when thresholds exceeded
Tool adhd_noise_check returns current density metrics
Tests cover threshold exceeded, normal, and edge cases

pending.subject: Implement push/event-driven delivery so agents don't need to poll
pending.description: Currently agents must poll the bus via adhd_read to discover messages. Add an event-driven mechanism so agents can subscribe to message types, topics, or recipient filters and get notified (via MCP notifications, inotify file watches, or a subscription registry on the bus) when matching messages arrive. This eliminates polling latency and reduces bus read volume.
acceptance: Agents can subscribe to specific message types, topics, or recipient filters
Subscription stored on the bus as a subscription message
New messages matching active subscriptions trigger a notification mechanism
Graceful fallback: agents without push support can still poll
Tests cover subscribe, unsubscribe, match notification, and no-match silence
